series_metadata.series_description: Secured system that requires username and password for ODE staff that works in collaborations with the AIR (American Institute for Research) secure system. This collaborative platform is used for all test development client’s items and other materials used during Item Batch Reviews, web previews, etc. This system is used to write tests then communicate with vendor for feedback until item reviews are satisfactory. The item reviews are stored in the repository of the AIR system until field testing is completed, which at that point, the tests cannot be modified, altered or deleted.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years after contract with vendor is expired, audited by Auditor of State, and audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
